title: Buttery Velvety Greek Lamb Skewers
description: A weeknight-friendly Greek dish featuring marinated lamb, served with crisp iceberg lettuce and a side of tangy tzatziki sauce, all under 500 calories per serving.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400°F.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F.
While the lamb is cooking, mix the Greek yogurt with a squeeze of lemon juice and a sprinkle of salt.
Once the lamb is cooked, brush the softened butter onto the skewers.
Serve the lamb skewers on a bed of iceberg lettuce leaves, with a dollop of the yogurt sauce and a sprinkle of parsley.
